issues.description: Condition missing: 'If the number of DON!! cards on your field is equal to or less than the number on your opponent's field' should be represented as a condition, not ignored with Always
Duration should be 'DuringOpponentTurn' (until opponent's next End Phase), not 'EndOfTurn'
Target should filter for '[Donquixote Rosinante] and {Heart Pirates} type Characters', not all own Characters
'Add up to 1' suggests optional/conditional count, but DSL specifies exactly 1. Consider if count should be flexible or clarify as mandatory 1
